messages.content:
Kruffman, Inc. recently changed its ……….. on allowing its employees to use company cars on personal business.
Select one:
a. accommodation
b. policy
c. measure
d. handling
b. policy

Because assembly line workers have been working overtime, meeting consumer demand for the company’s high-end products ………….. on schedule.
Select one:
a. will be remaining
b. remains
c. are remaining
d. remain
d. remain

The airport …………. the runway was shut down for repairs is experiencing a decline in the number of passengers arriving and departing daily.
Select one:
a. where
b. in it
c. in that
d. when
a. where

The nominating committee unanimously ………… Eric Carpenter as the company’s employee of the year.
Select one:
a. selecting
b. was selected
c. select
d. selected
d. selected

Doctors at the Hampden Hospital are supposed to participate in ………… regularly to keep informed about medical advances.
Select one:
a. contributions
b. conferences
c. prescriptions
d. agendas
b. conferences

A proposal for developing the next version of the Reading the Right Way program must be ………… before the beginning of next month.
Select one:
a. absolute
b. total
c. actual
d. ready
d. ready

The board of directors of the XT Mining Company said that they have …….. received permission from the government to begin exploratory excavations.
Select one:
a. closely
b. yet
c. soon
d. finally
b. yet

Mr. Chapman ……….. employed by Regis Electronics or its subsidiaries for the last 22 years.
Select one:
a. could be
b. has been
c. is
d. has
b. has been

The firm’s hiring guidelines were ………. by the new vice president after he listened to complaints by some employees in the Human Resources Department.
Select one:
a. revised
b. revise
c. revision
d. revising
a. revised

Foreign tourists often have a strong ……… for the day-long tours of the city as opposed to the two-hour tours.
Select one:
a. preference
b. placement
c. decision
d. choice
a. preference

Annual global CO2 emissions growth has always been a major economic crisis, but according to data from the international Energy Agency, for the first time in 40 years, annual CO2 emission growth in 2014 __1__ at 32 gigatonnes, unchanged from the previous year.
b. remained

Analysts said the slowdown in __2__ was attributed to changing patterns of energy use in China and in OECD countries.   missions.
  emissions.
  emigrants.
  emissaries.
a. emissions.
Countries around the world are aiming to get a new international climate change agreement at the United Nations Climate Change Conference, in Paris __3__ December 2015.
on
